svg.title: Analytics Agent · Architecture (AgentCore-native)
svg.text: AgentCore Runtime hosts the Claude Agent SDK · knowledge loaded from S3 at cold start · Aurora Serverless v2 (PostgreSQL) over a private VPC connection · /ask rides CloudFront VPC origin → internal ALB → Fargate relay

① Browser (X-Id-Token) → ② CloudFront VPC origin (private, unsigned) → ALB → ③ Fargate relay (JWT · SSE) → ④ AgentCore ⇄ Bedrock · green = S3 knowledge @ cold start · run_sql → Aurora (psycopg 5432) · dashed = in-flight
